implementation_drift.description: Caught two substring misreads: 'waggle dance' is NOT substring of 'waggle drift's role'; 'honey bee' is NOT substring of 'Honeybee' (no space). Corrected inline.

honest_note: PMC12467162 explicitly bridges biological communication (including bee-waggle-style) to UAV swarm agents — direct biomimetic precedent. TalkHier (2502.11098) is published structured-protocol prior art for LLM multi-agent communication.
